summary: R.6 Dashboard Tab-Based Management Tool - Complete Testing. 38/39 test cases PASSED. Fixed 1 bug: CalendarTab was missing isFinanceVisible check for sales role. All 6 tabs working correctly for super_admin. Sales role correctly restricted from Finance, Calendar, Clients tabs and € amounts hidden in Overview/Sales tabs.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with filters in top-right corner - minor visual overlap, filters still functional

critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_aggregations.py (867 lines): Comprehensive aggregation service with proper deal-based calculations. Uses deals.items.agreed_price for sold values, not properties.list_price. Correctly handles bank_stages and own_stages for payments.

DashboardTabs.jsx (700 lines): Well-structured with 6 tab components. StatCard, SectionCard, BreakdownTable reusable. Recharts integration for bar/pie charts. All data-testid attributes correctly implemented.
DashboardFilters.jsx (163 lines): Clean filter implementation with controlled components. Properly handles __all__ value for reset.
AdminDashboard.jsx (152 lines): Clean tab-based layout with proper filter state management and API integration.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing: 52 properties, 15 sold, 20 available, 5 active deals, 2 clients with deals, 8 overdue installments (26,570€)
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.6 fully tested. Key test points: (1) Title 'Управление' not 'Преглед', (2) 7 filters in dashboard-filters bar, (3) 6 tabs with correct data-testid, (4) Overview: 4 stat cards + pipeline funnel + action items + recent sales/inquiries, (5) Sales: 2 bar charts + 3 tables (type/floor/building), (6) Finance: 6 stat cards + 3 expected cards + 2 month charts + pie chart, (7) Calendar: 3 period cards + bar chart + 2 tables, (8) Clients: table with 8 columns + status badges, (9) Unsold: 4 stat cards + table with risk column. Sales role: Finance/Calendar/Clients show no-access, Overview hides paid/overdue cards, Sales table hides Потенциал column.

verified_features.feature: Login as super_admin → /admin shows 'Управление' title
Global filter bar with 7 filters (project, type, status, client, period, only_overdue, only_available)
6 tabs: Обзор, Продажби, Финанси, Календар, Клиенти, Непродадени
Overview tab: 4 stat cards (sold, available, paid, overdue)
Overview tab: Pipeline funnel with 5 steps
Overview tab: Action items section with overdue alert
Overview tab: Recent sales and inquiries mini tables
Sales tab: Bar charts by type and floor
Sales tab: 3 breakdown tables (type, floor, building)
Sales tab: Type row click applies filter and returns to Overview
Finance tab: 6 stat cards (contracted, paid, deposit, remaining, expected, overdue)
Finance tab: 3 expected cards (7d, 30d, 90d)
Finance tab: 2 month bar charts (paid, expected)
Finance tab: Pie chart for payment mode breakdown
Calendar tab: 3 period cards (week, month, quarter)
Calendar tab: Bar chart and 2 tables (upcoming, overdue)
Clients tab: Table with 8 columns and status badges
Unsold tab: 4 stat cards (count, potential, avg, long-standing)
Unsold tab: Table with risk column for > 90 days
Filter change triggers API call with query params
Only overdue checkbox filters calendar upcoming table
Reset filters button appears and works
Sales role: Finance tab shows no-access message
Sales role: Calendar tab shows no-access message
Sales role: Clients tab shows no-access message
Sales role: Overview hides paid and overdue cards
Sales role: Sales table has 5 columns (no Потенциал €)
Backend: property_type=apartment filter reduces overview.total_count from 52 to 18
Backend: Legacy keys (cash, sales, calendar, top_clients, recent_sales, alerts) present

bug_fixed.issue: CalendarTab was visible for sales role instead of showing no-access message
bug_fixed.root_cause: CalendarTab component was only checking if money_calendar data exists, not checking isFinanceVisible prop
bug_fixed.fix: Added isFinanceVisible prop to CalendarTab and check it before rendering content
